response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:00: Identified Mizumiya Su performing an original song 'Umiumi Unya Happy Life' based on on-screen text and audio context. The lyrics are highly repetitive and stylized ('Umiumi', 'Unya') and do not appear to be an existing cover of another artist's song, but rather a character-specific original song. 2. 02:00 onwards: Performance ends, and Mizumiya Su talks about her birthday merchandise. No other vocal music is present. 3. Search queries for lyrics confirmed it's an original production and not an existing song covered by her. Full lyrics are not available in standard databases, so I provided a transcription based on the audio and on-screen text.
response.global_summary: The video features a full song performance by the VTuber Mizumiya Su from hololive, titled "Umiumi Unya Happy Life". The song is her original, and it is followed by a showcase of birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: Mizumiya Su performs her original song 'Umiumi Unya Happy Life' on a stage with a digital background. The video includes on-screen lyrics and graphics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Opening - Upbeat and cute music) 

Umiumi unya happy life
Umiumi unya happy life
O-naka suita! 

(Verse/Chorus - The song continues with high energy and cute, repetitive Japanese lyrics)
Umiumi unya unya unya
Onaka suite tara
Tsute tonari no
Ban-gohan

(Note: Lyrics are largely stylized/repetitive sound phrases characteristic of the character and do not match any known standard song lyrics found in databases.)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (The lyrics are original to the VTuber and do not appear to have a standard published English translation. They contain repetitive phrases like 'Umiumi' and 'Happy Life'.)
